entries.kun: おぼえる/さめる/さます
entries.notes: Three kun-readings: おぼえる (memorize), さめる (wake up intransitive), さます (wake up transitive).
Primarily used in compounds: 念入り (careful), 記念 (memorial), 残念 (regrettable).
覚える = commit to memory (learning). Contrast with 思い出す = recall from memory.

entries.meaning: to wake up / to come to one's senses
entries.notes: Intransitive — the subject wakes up on their own. 目が覚める (eyes open / wake up). Contrast with 覚ます (transitive).

entries.meaning: to wake someone up / to bring to one's senses
entries.notes: Transitive — someone wakes another person/thing. 目を覚ます (wake someone up). Contrast with 覚める (intransitive).

entries.meaning: to get used to / to grow accustomed to
entries.notes: Takes に: 日本の生活に慣れる (get used to life in Japan).
忘 (N3.1) + 物 (N4.5). Common at train stations and schools.
忘 (N3.1) + 年 (N5.4) + 会 (N5.17). Lit. forget-year-gathering. A major social tradition in Japanese workplaces and friend groups.
習 (N4.32) + 慣 (N3.1). 生活習慣 = lifestyle habits.
自 (N4.11) + 覚 (N3.1). 自覚がある = to be self-aware.
目 (N5.18) + 覚ます (N3.1). Lit. eye-opener. Short for 目覚まし時計.
念 (N3.1) + 入 (N5.5). 念入りに準備する = to prepare carefully.
Kun: つれる (take along), つらなる (line up). On: れん in compounds like 連絡, 連休.
On: たつ in 上達, 達人. Also read たち/だち as a plural/group suffix: 友達, 私たち.
Kun: ちがう (be different/wrong), ちがえる (mistake). On: い in 違反 (violation).
Kun: からむ (get tangled/involved). On: らく in 連絡 (contact).

entries.meaning: to be different / to be wrong
entries.notes: それは違う = that's wrong. 意見が違う = opinions differ. One of the most common verbs in daily conversation.
文化の違い = cultural difference. AとBの違い = the difference between A and B.

entries.meaning: to make a mistake / to mix up
entries.notes: 間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). Transitive: 道を間違えた (took the wrong road). AをBと間違える = to mistake A for B.

entries.meaning: to be wrong / to be mistaken
entries.notes: 間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). Intransitive: 答えが間違っている (the answer is wrong). Often used in ている form to describe a state.
間 (N5.14) + 違 (N3.2). 間違いなく = without a doubt. 間違いがある = there is a mistake.

entries.meaning: to take someone along / to bring someone
entries.notes: 子どもを連れて行く = to take a child along. 連れて来る = to bring someone.
連 (N3.2) + 休 (N5.6). ゴールデンウィークは大型連休 = Golden Week is a major holiday stretch.
連 (N3.2) + 絡 (N3.2). する verb: 連絡する = to contact/get in touch. 連絡先 = contact information.
上 (N5.3) + 達 (N3.2). する verb: 上達する = to improve/get better at. 日本語が上達した = my Japanese has improved.
達 (N3.2) + 人 (N5.1). 料理の達人 = a cooking master.

entries.meaning: to get tangled / to get involved / to pick a fight
entries.notes: 糸が絡む = thread gets tangled. 話に絡む = to get involved in a conversation. Can also mean to pester/accost someone.
Kun: むかし (long ago). On: せき in 昔日 (old days, literary). Almost always read むかし.
On-reading only: さく in 昨日(きのう, irregular), 昨年(さくねん), 昨夜(さくや). 昨日 has the irregular kun-reading きのう.

entries.kun: はじめ/はじめて/はつ/うい
entries.notes: Kun: はじめ (beginning), はじめて (first time), はつ (first~). On: しょ in 初日(しょにち). Not to be confused with 始 (はじめる, to start).
Kun: つぎ (next). On: じ in 次回(じかい), 次第(しだい). Also つぐ = to succeed/follow.

entries.meaning: long ago / in the old days
entries.notes: 昔は〜 = in the old days... 昔の友達 = an old friend (from the past).
昔 (N3.3) + 話 (N5.9). 日本の昔話 = Japanese folk tales. 桃太郎 is a famous 昔話.
昨 (N3.3) + 年 (N5.4). More formal than 去年(きょねん). Common in news and business.
昨 (N3.3) + 夜 (N4.3). Also read ゆうべ in casual speech. 昨夜は寝られなかった = I couldn't sleep last night.
初めて日本に行った = I went to Japan for the first time. Not to be confused with 始めて (starting to do).
初めに = at first / to begin with. 初めから = from the beginning. Contrast: 始め(はじめ) = the start of an action.
初 (N3.3) + 日 (N5.2). 仕事の初日 = first day of work. 映画の初日 = opening day of a movie.
次 (N3.3) + 回 (N4.14). 次回の授業 = the next class. 次回も楽しみにしています = looking forward to next time.
次々と問題が起きた = problems arose one after another. Emphasizes rapid succession.
Kun: つづく (to continue, intrans), つづける (to continue, trans). On: ぞく in 連続(れんぞく, consecutive), 手続き(てつづき, procedure).
On-reading only: よ in 予定(よてい, plan), 予約(よやく, reservation), 予想(よそう, prediction). Always appears in compounds.
Kun: たば (bundle, bunch — 花束 はなたば). On: そく in 約束(やくそく, promise). 束ねる(たばねる) = to bundle/tie together.
Most common in 一緒(いっしょ, together). On: しょ in 一緒. Rare kun: お (cord/string). Not commonly used alone.
Transitive — you continue something: 勉強を続ける = to continue studying. Often follows te-form: 走り続ける = to keep running.

entries.meaning: to continue / to last / to follow
entries.notes: Intransitive — something continues on its own: 雨が続く = the rain continues. 道が続く = the road goes on. Pair with 続ける (transitive).
手 (N5.1) + 続 (N3.4). 入学の手続き = enrollment procedure. 手続きをする = to complete paperwork/formalities.
予 (N3.4) + 定 (N3.16). Write as 予てい until N3.16. 予定がある = to have plans. 予定を立てる = to make plans. 〜する予定です = planning to do ~.
予 (N3.4) + 約 (N3.66). Write as 予やく until N3.66. 予約する = to make a reservation. ホテルの予約 = hotel reservation.
約 (N3.66) + 束 (N3.4). Write as やくそく until N3.66 when 約 is taught. 約束する = to promise. 約束を守る = to keep a promise.
花 (N4.7) + 束 (N3.4). 花束をもらう = to receive a bouquet. A common gift for ceremonies and celebrations.
連 (N3.2) + 続 (N3.4). 連続ドラマ = serial drama. 三日連続 = three days in a row. 連続する = to be continuous.
